definitions.text: ta til eie eller i bruk noe som andre har eid eller brukt
definitions.translation: take ownership or into use something that others have owned or used

examples.en: take over the farm from one's parents

definitions.text: ta på seg ansvar, plikt eller lignende som en annen har hatt
definitions.translation: take on responsibility or duty that another has held

examples.en: take over as Minister of Justice

examples.no: automatisering har tatt over for manuell arbeidskraft
examples.en: automation has taken over from manual labor
